title: Center View of Item doesn't have Subscriber toggle
excerpt: Our Monday board setup doesn’t use the standard open from right side view, but instead using the center popup view (just generally preferred across our org). However, for some reason in this view Monday hasn’t removed th…

posts.author: AlichiaS (Ali Sawitoski)
posts.cookedHtml: Our Monday board setup doesn’t use the standard open from right side view, but instead using the center popup view (just generally preferred across our org). However, for some reason in this view Monday hasn’t removed the 3 dot toggle that allows for Subscribers to turn off notifications. Realize this isn’t the standard layout, but we’ve worked with several orgs who use the center popup view and so I need to find a way to toggle subscribers on/off at the Item level.
